name: IRON DEFICIENCY ANEMIA
dominant_finding: widening of diploe + thinning of tables with sparing of occiput (no red marrow)
discriminating_features: widening of diploe + thinning of tables with sparing of occiput (no red marrow)
osteoporosis in long bones (most prominent in hands)

general: widening of diploe + thinning of tables with sparing of occiput (no red marrow)
osteoporosis in long bones (most prominent in hands)
